---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or roadmap item
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What

One-line description of the feature.

## Why

What problem does it solve, or what pain does it remove? If it's a competitive-parity item, link to the competing extension/userscript and call out what they do better.

## Where it would live

If you've already looked at `ROADMAP.md`, which tier do you think this should land in? (Now / Next / Later / Under Consideration). One sentence justification is fine.

## House-style fit check

Confirm the feature does NOT require any of:

- [ ] A new keyboard shortcut
- [ ] A `backdrop-filter`
- [ ] A pill / oval / fully-rounded backdrop on a text-bearing element
- [ ] A confirmation dialog
- [ ] Telemetry, analytics, remote logging
- [ ] A light theme for RumbleX-owned UI

If any are unavoidable, explain why in the description.

## Notes / references

Any links, screenshots, or DOM samples that would help an implementer.
